85151: DoS vulnerability in protobuf <=6.33.4. Fix requires protobuf>6.33.4, but SageMaker SDK 2.9.0-3.0 constraint protobuf<6.32 prevents upgrade. This is SageMaker-specific and does not affect EC2 images.
88445: [pkg: sagemaker] image requires sagemaker v2 advisory='Affected versions of the sagemaker package are vulnerable to Remote Code Execution due to unsafe evaluation of user-controlled search expressions. The SageMaker Python SDK’s JumpStart search_hub() function evaluated attacker-controlled query parameters using eval() in its search functionality, allowing malformed input to reach a code execution path rather than being safely parsed.'
